particulars.description: All that freehold property known as 39 vanguard way, shoeburyness, SS3 9QY registered at land registry with title number EX487839 and all that freehold property known as 25 towerfield road, shoeburyness, SS3 9QT registered at land registry with title number EX528301 and for more details please see the charge.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender, by way of first legal mortgage the property being all of the freehold property know as 39 vanguard way, shoeburyness, southend-on-sea, SS3 9QY comprised on land registry title numbers: EX783132 and EX487839.. Please see charge document for more details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender, by way of first legal mortgage, all estates or interests in any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property now owned by it, including the real property (if any) specified in schedule 1, being all of the freehold property know as 39 vanguard way, shoeburyness, southend-on-sea, SS3 9QY comprised on land registry title numbers: EX783132 and EX487839.. As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender, by way of a first fixed charge, all present and future estates or interests of the borrower in, or over, any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property (other than any such property effectively mortgaged under clause 3.1); all the intellectual property.. Please see charge document for more details.
